ModifyParsingRecords.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters.
ModifyParsingRecords.rr: Host record, e.g. "www". The combined length of the record value and zone name must not exceed 255 characters.
ModifyParsingRecords.value: Record value, e.g. IP: "192.168.1.1", CNAME: "cname.baidu.com", MX: "mail.baidu.com".
ModifyParsingRecords.ttl: TTL (in seconds) for the DNS record cached on local DNS servers. Default is 300s for Basic edition, 120s for Standard edition, and 1s for Enterprise edition. Must be a positive integer.
ModifyParsingRecords.priority: Priority of the MX record. Valid range: [0, 50]. Required when the record type is MX.
